case_title: MA, KAY FAI vs. BANKS, CARLOS MAURICE et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BANKS, CARLOS MAURICE
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, KAY FAI

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, KAY FAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKS, CARLOS MAURICE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $139.59 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,139.59, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF
